title: Precise-gui-scale
description: Scales your minecraft at a fractional level. (e.g. 2.5) with 4 different slider bars for chat gui, in-game gui, menu gui and inventory gui.
body:
**Precise GUI Scale**

Precise GUI Scale gives you separate fractional GUI scaling slider bars for different parts of Minecraft so your HUD, chat, inventory, and menus can each have its own scale.

**Why this mod?**

Vanilla GUI scale is global and integer-based.
This mod lets you fine-tune each context independently, which helps a lot on high-resolution displays, mixed UI preferences etc.

**Features**
- Per-context scale controls:
  - In-game HUD scale
  - Chat scale
  - Inventory/container scale
  - Menu scale
- Fractional scaling support (for example 2.5x)
- In-game config screen
- Fabric + Mod Menu integration

**Compatibility**
Minecraft: 1.21.11 (as of now)

Loader: Fabric (0.18.4+)

**Requires:**

Fabric API (0.141.3+1.21.11 or newer)

Cloth Config API (21.11.153 or newer)

**Recommended:**

Mod Menu (17.0.0 or newer)
